гҖҖгҖҖWhen Sonny Capone, Dublin-born head of the Mafia in Rome, hears that his son Luke has been murdered in Dublin, he returns home to kill everyone in sight. Pitted against Dublin's notorious drug baron, James 'The Predator' Barrett, Sonny summons his Mafia gang to Dublin, where a final showdown will leave just one blood-drenched man standing.
introduction: When Sonny Capone, Dublin-born head of the Mafia in Rome, hears that his son Luke has been murdered in Dublin, he returns home to kill everyone in sight. Pitted against Dublin's notorious drug baron, James 'The Predator' Barrett, Sonny summons his Mafia gang to Dublin, where a final showdown will leave just one blood-drenched man standing.
